title: Infinity Full Bright
description: A simple client-side mod, press "I" to toggle Full Bright in Minecraft. Night Vision
body:
Infinity FullBright is a lightweight client-side mod that allows players to toggle FullBright with a single keybind.
It does not modify gameplay, does not require server-side installation, and works on any server, including vanilla.

This mod uses a custom lightmap override instead of changing the in‑game gamma value, providing a true FullBright effect in all environments — caves, night time, underwater, and more. 

🎮 Usage

Default toggle key: I

The keybind can be changed in Options → Controls → Keybinds

A small status message appears when FullBright is enabled or disabled
